name: roman-numeral-converter
description: Roman numeral web service with React UI, caching, metrics, and structured logging

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
